title: Opening for Production Engineer at Supreme Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Supreme Industries
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
